name.en: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana

benefit.en: Term life insurance cover of rupees 2 lakh for any cause of death, at an annual premium of rupees 436
benefit.hi: किसी भी कारण से मृत्यु पर 2 लाख रुपये का जीवन बीमा, वार्षिक प्रीमियम 436 रुपये

eligibility_rules_human: Indian resident aged 18 to 50 with a savings bank or post office account, who consents to auto-debit of premium and Aadhaar linkage. Coverage continues to age 55 if enrolled before 50.

offline_steps: Submit signed consent form at the bank
Coverage active for the policy year June 1 to May 31
